articles.title: New Zealand and Bangladesh brace for Chattogram batting surge
articles.description: The first two ODIs were played in spin-friendly conditions. The decider will be played on a flat pitch

articles.title: Jude Bellingham buys minority stake in Hundred franchise Birmingham Phoenix
articles.description: Real Madrid star and Birmingham City graduate invests approx £1 million in home city club

articles.title: Wasim Khan to step down as ICC's general manager
articles.description: His impending exit follows the departure of several senior ICC officials over the last two years

articles.title: Shanaka banned from PSL for one year for IPL switch
articles.description: Shanaka opted out of a contract with Lahore Qalandars and later joined IPL team Rajasthan Royals

articles.title: Former Afghanistan quick Shapoor Zadran battles for his life in Delhi hospital
articles.description: Shapoor Zadran is suffering from Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis (HLH), a rare, life-threatening disease, in which the immune system starts failing

articles.title: Five UAE cricketers given citizenship through naturalisation
articles.description: Khuzaima Tanveer, Ajay Kumar, Akshdeep Nath, Harpreet Bhatia and Adeeb Usmani are the players with UAE citizenship

articles.title: 'Incredibly excessive' - Blessing Muzarabani's agent on PSL ban
articles.description: The agent denied that a binding agreement between the league and the player had been reached before Muzarabani ultimately opted to sign a contract with the IPL

articles.title: Sarfaraz appointed head coach as Pakistan name four newbies for Bangladesh Tests
articles.description: Abdullah Fazal, Amad Butt, Azan Awais, and Ghazi Ghori are the new faces in Pakistan's Test squad; Asad Shafiq (batting coach) and Umar Gul (bowling coach) join the back room

articles.title: ECB to review injury replacements rule after fresh round of criticism
articles.description: Lancashire baffled after Tom Bailey turned down as like-for-like replacement for Ajeet Singh Dale

articles.title: ECB considering relaxing rules on England eligibility
articles.description: Changes under discussion could bring England qualification more into line with ICC regulations

articles.title: PCB in talks to build cricket stadium in Saudi Arabia
articles.description: The governing body wants to build a facility which could organise top-level games, along with PSL matches.

articles.title: 'I feel bad for him even today' - Kris Srikkanth reveals reason why Rohit Sharma missed out on 2011 World Cup
articles.description: Rohit Sharma would go on to carve his own legacy in ICC tournaments. The Mumbai Indians star captained India to the 2024 T20 World Cup and 2025 Champions Trophy wins.

articles.title: R Ashwin predicts the next big thing in Indian cricket! It's not Vaibhav Sooryavanshi or Ayush Mhatre
articles.description: Ravichandran Ashwin opined that the ability to play impactful knocks puts Punjab Kings' young opener Priyansh Arya slightly ahead of fellow prodigies Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Ayush Mhatre.

articles.title: San Francisco Unicorns set to feature in Global Super League 2026
articles.description: Their participation highlights the continued growth of franchise cricket in the United States and its increasing connection with established cricketing regions.
